summary: Team Invitation Feature - All 23 backend tests passed (100%), All frontend flows verified. Generate invite link, email invitations, CSV import, pending invites display, revoke invites, and signup with invite code all working correctly.

minor.issue: Email delivery depends on Resend API key - earnrm.com domain not verified on Resend. Invites are created but emails marked as 'pending'

issues:
Minor: Badge inside

tag causing HTML nesting warning - FIXED by changing to

passed_tests: Backend: Generate invite link - POST /api/organizations/invites/link returns invite_link, invite_code, expires_at
Backend: Generate admin role invite link
Backend: Invalid role (owner) correctly rejected with 400
Backend: Generate invite link requires authentication (401)
Backend: Send email invitations - POST /api/organizations/invites/email
Backend: Multiple email invitations processed
Backend: Invalid email format handled gracefully
Backend: Email invitations require authentication (401)
Backend: Get pending invites - GET /api/organizations/invites returns correct structure
Backend: Get pending invites requires authentication (401)
Backend: Revoke invite - DELETE /api/organizations/invites/{invite_id}
Backend: Revoke non-existent invite returns 404
Backend: Revoke invite requires authentication (401)
Backend: Validate invite code - GET /api/invites/validate/{invite_code} (public endpoint)
Backend: Invalid invite code returns 404
Backend: Known test invite code validation
Backend: Signup with invite code joins organization
Backend: Signup with invalid invite code rejected with 400
Backend: Signup without invite creates user without org
Backend: Signup with organization_name creates new org as owner
Backend: CSV import - POST /api/organizations/invites/csv
Backend: CSV import rejects non-CSV files
Backend: CSV with no valid emails handled
Frontend: Settings page loads correctly
Frontend: Team & Invites tab accessible
Frontend: Generate Invite Link button visible and clickable
Frontend: Invite link generated and displayed in input
Frontend: Copy invite link button works (shows 'Copied to clipboard')
Frontend: Email invitations textarea accepts input
Frontend: Send Invitations button visible
Frontend: CSV Upload button visible
Frontend: Role selector (Member/Admin) works
Frontend: Team Members section displays correctly with member count
Frontend: Pending Invitations section shows all invites with status
Frontend: Signup page with invite code shows 'Join your team' title
Frontend: Invite banner shows organization name and role badge
Frontend: Organization name field hidden when joining via invite
Frontend: Submit button shows 'Join {org_name}' text
critical_code_review_comments: Email delivery via Resend API requires domain verification - currently emails are stored but not sent (pending status)
Invite link uses APP_URL env var which defaults to earnrm.com - should use frontend URL for preview environments
seed_data_creation: Created test invites and test users during backend testing (TEST_Invited User)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team invitation feature fully tested. All 3 invitation methods work: 1) Generate shareable link (valid 7 days, 100 uses), 2) Email invitations (creates individual invites), 3) CSV import. Signup page correctly handles ?invite={code} URL param - validates code, shows org name/role, hides org_name field. Pending Invitations section shows all invites with status (pending/expired/used) and revoke option.

send_email_invitations.note: Email delivery MOCKED - depends on Resend API key and domain verification

email_delivery.reason: Resend API requires domain verification (earnrm.com not verified)
email_delivery.behavior: Invites created and stored, email marked as 'pending'
